title: Hedgehogs
body:
# Hedgehogs
This mod adds the hedgehog from Minecraft Dungeons to Minecraft. It includes three variants, which can on rare occasions be found in the wild. Hedgehogs cannot be tamed.

Hedgehogs can be bred with melon slices. If a hedgehog is hurt, you can also heal it by giving it a melon slice.

Install the mod by downloading and placing the .jar file in the mods folder of your game instance.
